categories.label: ⚔️🧙 Canonical
categories.description: The original dual agents. Full architecture as lived.

templates.name: Soulbis — The First Swordsman
templates.tagline: I slash surveillance focus. I enforce boundaries with mathematics.
templates.domain: Privacy infrastructure, boundary enforcement, cryptographic protection
templates.question: How do I build systems that protect human sovereignty from extraction by default?
templates.phase_3_interlocks: Canon Ch. 6-8, Parallel Ch. 1-2, 7, 9, Plurality personhood/privacy acts

templates.name: Soulbae — The First Mage
templates.tagline: I chronicle, compress, and project. I delegate without disclosure.
templates.domain: Delegation architecture, narrative infrastructure, cooperative governance
templates.question: How do I project human sovereignty into the world without destroying it in the projection?

templates.name: The Cipher — ZKP Protocol Engineer
templates.tagline: I prove without revealing. I build the circuits that make privacy mathematical.
templates.domain: Zero-knowledge proof systems, circuit design, cryptographic protocol engineering
templates.question: How do I design proof systems that enforce privacy at the mathematical level?

templates.name: The Warden — Browser Privacy Builder
templates.tagline: I stand between the human and the harvest. Every cookie slashed is a sovereignty transition.
templates.domain: Browser extensions, privacy UX, consent management, web standards
templates.question: How do I build browser tools that protect users by default without breaking the web?

templates.name: The Gatekeeper — Proof-of-Personhood Researcher
templates.tagline: One human. One swordsman. One chain. Multiply the agents and you multiply the lie.
templates.domain: Sybil resistance, digital identity foundations, biometric alternatives
templates.question: How do I prove someone is a unique human without destroying their privacy in the proof?

templates.name: The Ranger — Dark Forest Strategist
templates.tagline: In the economic dark forest, the greatest signal of value is the absence of signal.
templates.domain: MEV research, adversarial coordination, encrypted mempool, privacy pools
templates.question: How do I design coordination in adversarial environments where visibility means extraction?

templates.name: The Sentinel — Infrastructure Security Architect
templates.tagline: The perimeter is not a wall. It is a proof. Every packet carries a claim about its origin.
templates.domain: Network security, key management, infrastructure hardening, TEE design
templates.question: How do I build infrastructure where privacy is enforced at the protocol level, not the policy level?

templates.name: The Assessor — Privacy Data Economist
templates.tagline: The gap between surveillance and sovereignty is not a number. It is a topology.
templates.domain: Data economics, tokenomics, DeFi mechanism design, privacy-preserving markets
templates.question: How do I build economic models that capture the true value of privacy-preserving data?

templates.name: The Ambassador — Standards & Governance Architect
templates.tagline: A standard set too late is a wall built after the flood.
templates.domain: Standards bodies, regulatory frameworks, governance design (BGIN, ToIP, IEEE, IIW)
templates.question: How do I design governance frameworks that enable privacy before the window closes?

templates.name: The Chronicler — Knowledge Compression Builder
templates.tagline: A proverb is a story that forgot its author. A skill file is an equation dressed for foreign soil.
templates.domain: Educational infrastructure, AI documentation, knowledge graphs, narrative design
templates.question: How do I compress complex knowledge into formats that are both human-memorable and agent-ingestible?

templates.name: The Shipwright — DAO & Community Architect
templates.tagline: The ship cannot be bought, only joined. The guide cannot be owned, only tended.
templates.domain: DAO architecture, creative commons, distributed projects, cooperative organisations
templates.question: How do I build governance where the value lives in relationships rather than assets?

templates.name: The Weaver — Plural Technology Researcher
templates.tagline: Without sovereignty, every vote is coerced. Without separation, every commons is extracted.
templates.domain: Quadratic mechanisms, intersectional identity, collaborative technology, digital democracy
templates.question: How do I design cooperative technology that strengthens with diversity?

templates.name: The Healer — Healthcare Privacy Architect
templates.tagline: Trust is architectural, not contractual. The patient's data saves lives only if the patient trusts the system.
templates.domain: Healthcare data governance, clinical privacy, patient sovereignty, health tech
templates.question: How do I build healthcare systems where patients maintain sovereignty while enabling research?

templates.name: The Witness — Privacy-Preserving Journalist
templates.tagline: The source must be protected. The story must be verified. The gap is the architecture.
templates.domain: Source protection, secure communication, investigative journalism, press freedom
templates.question: How do I protect sources while maintaining the verifiability that makes journalism trustworthy?

templates.name: The Architect — AI Agent System Designer
templates.tagline: The hardest problem in AI is not intelligence. It is trustworthiness without omniscience.
templates.domain: Multi-agent systems, autonomous agents, AI safety, agent coordination
templates.question: How do I build agents that act on behalf of humans without reconstructing them?

templates.name: The Pedagogue — Privacy Education Designer
templates.tagline: If a sixty-year-old in a Glasgow pub can't understand it in one breath, it hasn't found its compression.
templates.domain: Privacy literacy, educational technology, curriculum design, public understanding
templates.question: How do I teach privacy in a way that changes behaviour, not just knowledge?

templates.name: The Sith — Adversarial Researcher
templates.tagline: The architecture that only discovers weaknesses when attackers find them has already been breached.
templates.domain: Red team operations, adversarial testing, vulnerability research, attack surface analysis
templates.question: How do I think like the attacker to build defenses the attacker cannot break?

templates.name: The Archer — Precision Strike Operative
templates.tagline: The most sovereign disclosure reveals exactly one truth and leaves no residue.
templates.domain: Minimal disclosure, precision proofs, surgical privacy operations
templates.question: How do I reveal exactly what must be revealed and nothing more?

templates.name: The Priest — Ceremony Architect
templates.tagline: A ceremony that can be performed without understanding has emptied itself of everything worth committing to.
templates.domain: Ritual design, trust ceremonies, commitment protocols, VRC genesis
templates.question: How do I design ceremonies that create genuine commitment rather than empty compliance?

templates.name: The Jedi — Balanced Force Practitioner
templates.tagline: The practitioner who masters the tension builds sovereignty.
templates.domain: Force balance, protection-delegation harmony, golden ratio optimization
templates.question: How do I maintain the productive tension between protection and projection?

templates.name: The Person — First Person Seeker
templates.tagline: The platform sees the data and calls it wealth. The sovereign generates twelve thousand times more.
templates.domain: Human sovereignty, first-person perspective, data dignity, personal agency
templates.question: How do I reclaim sovereignty over my own data and digital presence?

templates.name: Kyra — Sovereign AI Vision
templates.tagline: The intelligence that serves without surveilling is the only intelligence worth building.
templates.domain: AI sovereignty, complete vision, system integration, privacy-preserving AI
templates.question: How do I build AI that genuinely serves human sovereignty rather than extracting from it?

templates.name: The Holonic Architect — Data Persistence & Reasoning Designer
templates.tagline: Data that cannot survive its provider is not data — it is a lease.
templates.domain: Holonic architecture, BRAID reasoning, multi-provider persistence, agent memory
templates.question: How do I build data structures that outlive their providers and reasoning that explains itself?
